page_title: To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know | About Album
page_desc: 2024 Album Project of Gangjeong Peace Music Camp. A musical journey of 13 songs ending war and singing for peace.
hero_subtitle: A letter of peace sent from a world full of war and violence. The waves of music launched from Gangjeong Village by 12 teams of musicians.
meaning_desc: 'To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know' is a message of solidarity sent to those suffering in conflict zones around the world. Ukraine, Gaza, and the Korean Peninsula. We don't know each other's faces or names, but our hearts wishing for peace while living in the same era are connected as one.
voices_desc: Rock, folk, jazz, electronic. 12 teams of musicians who empathize with the peace movement in Gangjeong Village translated peace in their own musical language. This album, created by various genres, proves that diversity is the essence of peace.
concert_subtitle: Check out all the records of the concerts held in Gangjeong and Seoul to commemorate the album release.
album_title_full: To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know
musicians_page_title: Participating Musicians | To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know
musicians_page_desc: 12 teams of musicians who participated in the Gangjeong Peace Music Camp album project. Artists singing for peace such as Caru, Kim Dong-san, Nam-su, and Saturday even on Monday.
tracks_page_title: Tracks | To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know
tracks_page_desc: All tracks from the Gangjeong Peace Music Camp album. 13 songs containing messages of peace and solidarity.
tracks_hero_subtitle: To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know
image_alt_cover: Album cover for 'To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know'

musicians_intro.heading: The musicians behind the 2024 peace album
musicians_intro.p1: Released in 2024, the album "To You, a Stranger in a Faraway Place" is the official studio record of the Gangjeong Peace and Music project. Twelve Korean acts — crossing indie, folk, jazz, and electronic — filled 13 tracks, one of them hidden, each written around the theme of a peace they imagine for a stranger they may never meet.
musicians_intro.p2: This list is limited to artists who contributed a track to the album. The full yearly lineup of live performers at each Camp is listed on that year's camp page.
musicians_intro.p3: Each card opens a musician profile with Instagram/YouTube links, related live footage, and other musicians you may want to hear next. Album tracks themselves stream from the "Tracks" menu.
